layoutDescription: Offset hero image overlapping a colored content panel; credibility strip overlaps photo edge; services in staggered two-column rhythm, not uniform cards.
antiPatterns: No food menu language. Gallery should showcase work, not template beauty shots.
photoInventory: You will receive 10 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
